meta.title: Bitrefill Catalog
meta.description: Browse Bitrefill product catalogs and order history as formatted markdown reports. Gift card listings, order summaries, and redemption receipts.

getProductCatalog.name: getProductCatalog
getProductCatalog.description: Get a formatted markdown table of available products

getOrderHistoryReport.name: getOrderHistoryReport
getOrderHistoryReport.description: Get a formatted markdown report of recent orders

getOrderReceipt.name: getOrderReceipt
getOrderReceipt.description: Get a formatted markdown receipt including redemption codes
